purpose: Theme-regression composite — every theme-relevant component on one canvas. Per visual-fixture-consolidation decision (knowledge/20260510-035000): additive 10th fixture, not yet replacing the 9 isolated fixtures. Provides measurement data for whether a single composite catches the same theme regressions the per-component fixtures do.
scope: Buttons (primary+secondary), Card, Text (h2/body/caption/code chips), fenced pre block, TextField, Slider, Row layout. EXCLUDED: Modal (separate shadow scope), MultipleChoice + CheckBox (upstream-bug rendering would contaminate diff signal), Tabs + Icon (have their own isolated fixtures still earning their keep).
tolerance_note: Threshold raised slightly from 0.1% global default — the embedded slider exhibits the same accent-color paint flicker as the standalone slider fixture (see slider.meta.json), but at lower amplitude here because it's one of many components on the canvas. 0.5% covers the slider sub-region without masking real theme regressions in the rest of the composite.
